ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aakash Exploration Services Limited's promoter group is undertaking an inter-se transfer where Mr. Navinchandra Haria will acquire 7.19% of the company's shares from Mr. Krunal Haria via a gift. This transaction consolidates a significant stake under Mr. Navinchandra Haria and fully divests Mr. Krunal Haria, without any financial consideration. The transfer is exempt from triggering a public open offer under SEBI regulations (as an immediate relative transfer within the promoter group) and represents an internal restructuring of shareholding, presenting no immediate financial red flags for public shareholders.
